HGSS.613.0000:
Pryce: Pokémon have many experiences
in their lives, just like we do.\f
I, too, have seen and suffered much in
my life.\f
Since I am your elder, let me show you
what I mean.\f
I have been training Pokémon since
before you were born.\f
I do not lose easily.
I, Pryce--the Winter Trainer--\r
shall demonstrate my power!\f
HGSS.613.0001:
Pryce: I am impressed by your prowess.\f
With your strong will, I know you
will overcome all life’s obstacles.\r
You are worthy of this Badge!\f
HGSS.613.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Glacier Badge from Pryce!
HGSS.613.0003:
Pryce: That Badge will raise the Special
stats of Pokémon.\f
It also lets your Pokémon use
Whirlpool to get across\r
real whirlpools.\f
And this... This is a gift from me!\f
HGSS.613.0004:
Pryce: That TM contains Hail.\f
It summons a hailstorm that lasts for
five turns. The hailstorm damages\r
all types except Ice.
HGSS.613.0005:
Pryce: When the ice and snow melt,
spring arrives.\f
You and your Pokémon will be together
for many years to come.\r
Cherish your time together!
HGSS.613.0006:
Pryce: It is you...\f
Since you are here, why don’t we
take a picture together? [0200,0000]
HGSS.613.0007:
Pryce: I have advice to give you before
we take the picture.\f
Breathe in and relax first.
Then slowly begin to smile.\r
Are you ready?\f
HGSS.613.0008:
Pryce: Let’s see...
Did we get a good one?
HGSS.613.0009:
Pryce: That’s OK, too.
Suit yourself.
HGSS.613.0010:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC to delete
some pictures.
